notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- The **collapse/expand sidebar button and the traffic lights now line up** with
  the tabs and back/forward — no more floating slightly high.
- Fixed the **stray divider line under the active tab** — the open tab now merges
  cleanly into the page.
- In a **very narrow window**, back/forward and the new-tab ＋ now tuck away so the
  one tab and the toggles still fit.
